DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-20-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: SHELLEY BUCHANAN, ESQ., 415.566.3526, FOR DEFENDANT SASON GAZAL; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS SASON GAZAL AND TURGAY SENEL'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINTis sustained with ten days leave to amend to allege, if Plaintiff can do so in good faith, a cause of action against defendants Defendants Gazal and Senel. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS SASON GAZAL & TURGAY SENEL'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS Off calendar. Amended complaint filed. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
